title: rubus mearnsii
intro: Rubus mearnsii, also known as the Himalayan blackberry, is a woody shrub native to the Himalayan region and parts of Asia. The medicinal properties of Rubus mearnsii include its anthelmintic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of consuming Rubus mearnsii include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Rubus mearnsii is commonly prepared as a tea or tincture, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat conditions such as diarrhea and fever.
